public_beat: Live GitHub Pages deploy of the balanced 3-stage Shadow Lord campaign

stages.outcome: Concept, presentation (narration+typing+sprites+storyboard), resources (12 audio, 16 sprites, emblem), and core build shipped; live stage clear measured 7.1s/14act (bot pace).
risks: Stage-1 loop upper band shrinks if action counts grow

stages.outcome: Balance v2: casual 51.0% in-band, 4 archetypes viable + rusher lesson, combos live (EV 1.119), comeback proven; defeat reachable live in production.
risks: TTK seconds target undefined — G2 TTK row unjudgeable

stages.outcome: Ops evidence strong (perf p95 9.2ms, SW cache v2, live E2E 47-action full campaign, marker CI guard) but G4 immersion scoring and G1 final audit remain unrun.
risks: G4 structured immersion sessions not run
G1 full content audit not run

gates.measured_value: scenario-bible self-audit: 0 new contradictions; 4 pre-existing worldview inventory gaps recorded; full build audit not-run
gates.measurement_method: ScenarioWriter G1 self-audit table vs worldview.md

gates.threshold: 100% mechanics; win rates 45–55%; TTK ±15%; no combo >1.3× median EV
gates.measured_value: casual 51.0% (n=200); combo EV 1.119x; TTK row unjudgeable (no seconds target — director-accepted gap)
4/5 archetypes complete with distinct sequences/outcomes; rusher 0% as intentional lesson; casual branch census 0.67-0.89

gates.threshold: median ≥4/5; feedback ≤100 ms; 0 unresolved S1/S2 readability
gates.measured_value: feedback latency structurally ≤1 frame (p95 9.2ms); structured immersion scoring not-run
gates.measurement_method: frame sampling + code path review; human sessions pending

gates.threshold: paid/free delta ≤5 pp; reversal ≤30%; free parity 10–20 sessions
gates.measured_value: no monetization shipped (delta 0pp, vacuous-true by design); comeback reversal is play-earned (domain), not purchase
gates.measurement_method: revenue-map review — monetization disabled this cycle per negotiation record

gates.threshold: telemetry, rollback, checklist; p95 ≤16.7 ms; long frames <0.5%; 30-min stable; input ≤100 ms
gates.measured_value: p95 9.2ms; long frames 0/300; heap 3.1MB; SW v2 0-transfer reload; rollback workflow_dispatch path exists; marker guard added to CI; 30-min soak not-run (structural: static page, 3.1MB heap, zero timers beyond rAF)
live stage clears 7.1/8.8/9.3s at bot pace (9-17 act/stage; human-pace conversion in-band); reward 3/3; repeat proxy PARTIAL (restart verified, human sessions pending)
gates.measurement_method: live browser drivers (2 policies) + simulator proxy

gates.measured_value: novelty candidate (extraction-to-legion loop + persistent-integrity comeback) documented; 5-title frequency matrix pending final scoring
gates.measurement_method: trend-survey frequency table; impression scoring pending

unresolved_risks.description: G4 structured immersion scoring and G1 full-build audit not run (need human sessions).
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Run 10 voluntary human sessions with immersion scoring next cycle entry.

unresolved_risks.description: TTK seconds target undefined; G2 TTK row cannot be judged.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Designer defines seconds target in balance-sheet band-overrides.

unresolved_risks.description: Concurrent-session battle-visualizer refactor of app.js in flight at cycle close.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: CI marker guard + node --check gate protect deploy; next cycle re-verifies live.
